Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.declaration

Class Modifier

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.declaration.Modifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Abstract, AnnotationUseSpecification, Final, Ghost, Model, Modifiers.ABSTRACT, Modifiers.DEFAULT, Modifiers.FINAL, Modifiers.JML_CODE, Modifiers.JML_CODE_BIGINT_MATH, Modifiers.JML_CODE_JAVA_MATH, Modifiers.JML_CODE_SAFE_MATH, Modifiers.JML_HELPER, Modifiers.JML_INSTANCE, Modifiers.JML_NO_STATE, Modifiers.JML_NON_NULL, Modifiers.JML_NON_NULL_BY_DEFAULT, Modifiers.JML_NON_NULL_ELEMENTS, Modifiers.JML_NULLABLE, Modifiers.JML_NULLABLE_BY_DEFAULT, Modifiers.JML_OT_PEER, Modifiers.JML_OT_READ_ONLY, Modifiers.JML_OT_REP, Modifiers.JML_PACKAGE, Modifiers.JML_PURE, Modifiers.JML_SPEC_BIGINT_MATH, Modifiers.JML_SPEC_JAVA_MATH, Modifiers.JML_SPEC_PACKAGE, Modifiers.JML_SPEC_PRIVATE, Modifiers.JML_SPEC_PROTECTED, Modifiers.JML_SPEC_PUBLIC, Modifiers.JML_SPEC_SAFE_MATH, Modifiers.JML_STRICTLY_PURE, Modifiers.JML_TWO_STATE, Modifiers.JML_UNPARSABLE_MODIFIERS, Modifiers.NATIVE, Modifiers.NON_SEALED, Modifiers.PRIVATE, Modifiers.PROTECTED, Modifiers.PUBLIC, Modifiers.SEALED, Modifiers.STATIC, Modifiers.STRICTFP, Modifiers.SYNCHRONIZED, Modifiers.TRANSIENT, Modifiers.TRANSITIVE, Modifiers.VOLATILE, Native, NoState, Static, StrictFp, Synchronized, Transient, TwoState, VisibilityModifier, Volatile
public abstract class Modifier extends JavaProgramElement
Modifier. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
